title: Simple Anti X-Ray
description: A robust anti x-ray mod for Fabric.
body:
An anti x-ray mod that hides ores from players that do not have line-of-sight to them. The list of blocks that are hidden is fully configurable to allow support for modded ores and other blocks as well.

[Video Demonstration](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fXhtN5GxmaI)
